{{Quote|A fate worse than death.|[[Alpha (Advanced Recon Commando)|Alpha-17's]] opinion on being assigned to the Pack|<ref name="Star Wars: Republic: The Battle of Jabiim">''[[Star Wars: Republic: The Battle of Jabiim]]''</ref>}}
'''The Padawan Pack''' was an ad-hoc unit of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]] whose [[Jedi Master/Legends|Masters]] had been killed in the [[Battle of Jabiim]]. It was hoped that a large group of inexperienced Jedi would equal the effectiveness of a smaller number of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Knights]] or Masters. Of all the members of the Padawan Pack, only [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] survived. As the battle raged, the Padawan Pack fell one by one, sometimes together. [[Aubrie Wyn]] succeeded in killing the [[Jabiimi Nationalists|Jabiimi Nationalist]] leader [[Alto Stratus]], but at the cost of her own life.

==Members of the Padawan Pack==
Each member of the Pack had lost their [[Jedi Master/Legends|master]] during the fighting of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. After the deaths of all [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Knights]] and Masters on [[Jabiim/Legends|Jabiim]], the [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]] charged into battle without leadership. During the [[Battle of Jabiim|battle]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] was recalled to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] by [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. Taking [[Master Sirrus's holocron]], Anakin reluctantly retreated.

[[File:Padawanpack2.jpg|thumb|left|180px|The pack battles the [[Jabiimi Nationalists]].]]

On the fortieth day of battle, [[Tae Diath]] was the first to fall, killed by [[A-series assassin droid]]s. Because of her psychic connection to Diath, [[Elora Sund]] was killed of psychic backlash. On the next day [[Windo Nend]] was crushed under the wheel of a [[IG-227 Hailfire-class droid tank/Legends|Hailfire droid]]. [[Zule Xiss]]'s life was ended by a falling [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]].

On day forty-two, [[Mak Lotor]] and [[Kass Tod]] died together after being bombarded by incoming missiles from a Hailfire droid. On the following day, [[Vaabesh]]'s containment suit was breached, causing him to suffocate. [[Aubrie Wyn]] was the last to die, when she was killed in combat with [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]] [[Alto Stratus]].
